name: Lemon Blueberry Crunch
recipeInstructions: Reserve 1/4 cup crushed cookies for topping. In a large bowl, combine the remaining crushed cookies and melted margarine; mix well. Press lightly into the bottom of a 13 x 9-inch pan. Refrigerate for 10-15 minutes. Spread half of the ice cream evenly over the prepared crust. Spoon the blueberry pie filling over the ice cream layer. Top with the remaining ice cream, then sprinkle with the reserved crushed cookies. Cover and freeze for at least 2 hours or until firm. If frozen overnight, let stand at room temperature for 10-15 minutes before serving.
